assertions.title: JSON schema type replacement
assertions.evidence: 5 tests in 'primitive type replacement (VAL-DATA-001)' describe block all pass. Tests verify: string→'string', number→'number', boolean→'boolean', null→'null', and mixed primitive types.

steps.expected: All primitive type replacement tests pass

assertions.title: JSON schema array collapse
assertions.evidence: 7 tests in 'array collapse/expand (VAL-DATA-002)' describe block all pass. Tests verify: 3+ items collapsed to '[ N items ]', <3 items expanded inline, empty arrays preserved, single-element arrays expanded, arrays of objects collapsed, exactly 3 items triggers collapse.

assertions.title: JSON schema object collapse
assertions.evidence: 4 tests in 'object collapse/expand (VAL-DATA-003)' describe block all pass. Tests verify: objects with 3+ keys collapsed at depth limit to '{ N keys }', objects with <3 keys expanded, key names preserved exactly.
testNames: collapses objects with 3+ keys at depth limit
expands objects with < 3 keys at depth limit
collapses top-level large objects' nested deep objects

assertions.title: JSON schema max depth 3
assertions.evidence: 5 tests in 'max depth 3 (VAL-DATA-004)' describe block all pass. Tests verify: deeply nested structures collapsed beyond depth 3, large objects beyond depth 3 collapsed, boundary behavior at depth 3 correct.
testNames: enforces max depth of 3 for deeply nested structures
handles nesting exactly at depth 3 boundary
does not nest output beyond 3 levels for large objects
collapses deeply nested structures at depth boundary

summary: Tested 4 assertions (VAL-DATA-001 through VAL-DATA-004): all 4 passed. 33 total tests in json-schema.test.ts all pass with 0 failures. Test execution completed in 287ms.
